---
title: Publicaciones
---

### Lista completa disponible en **Google Scholar** [URL](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=es&user=m67uDzwAAAAJ&sortby=pubdate&view_op=list_works&gmla=AJsN-F7VBpPW1UL_NFp6P3f-DY1Grqu21Bq92bRrrKN014kNpvSuYV4ix3n1XVMJhPM13mtWOWHCvpFOTaBJ3-iKjUbAVH9Sd8K_EYO8FDprUR-R6IiOgf7M0aFVWIzTZ30EMYjGCkBe4xnH456mUIOJyxbobQ0bC05DDn0ST8Qz6lfWSOPRRlliwJP2nihCNNJEIIACyFfbT3xAAZQnS7ApsmF5dLvKuw&sciund=6955458755375050157)


## Artículos publicados

# 2025

# 2024

- de Vries E, Calvache JA, Hernández Zambrano SM (2024). Role of caregivers being trained in assisting in end of life care – Latin American perspective. _Current Opinion in Supportive & Palliative Care_ 2024. doi:[10.1097/SPC.0000000000000730](https://doi.org/10.1097/SPC.0000000000000730)

- McConnell T, Mendieta CV, de Vries E, et al (2024). Developing research priorities for palliative care in Colombia: a priority setting partnership approach. _BMC Palliat Care_ 2024;**23**:194. doi:[10.1186/s12904-024-01534-z](https://doi.org/10.1186/s12904-024-01534-z)

- Mendieta CV, Calvache JA, Rondón MA, Rincón-Rodríguez CJ, Ahmedzai SH, de Vries E (2024). Validation of the Spanish translation Sheffield Profile for Assessment and Referral for Care (SPARC-Sp) at the Hospital Universitario San Jose of Popayan, Colombia. _Palliative and Supportive Care_ 2024;1-12. doi:[10.1017/S1478951524000476](https://doi.org/10.1017/S1478951524000476)

- Moreno S, Mendieta CV, de Vries E, et al (2024). Translation and linguistic validation of the Sheffield Profile for Assessment and Referral for Care (SPARC) to Colombian Spanish. _Palliative and Supportive Care_ 2024;1-10. doi:[10.1017/S1478951524000038](https://doi.org/10.1017/S1478951524000038)

# 2023

- Mendieta CV, de Vries E, Gomez-Neva ME, et al (2023). Barriers and facilitators to palliative care for patients with non-curable cancer in Colombia: perspectives of allied health and social care professionals. _BMC Palliat Care_ 2023;**22**:149. doi:[10.1186/s12904-023-01267-5](https://doi.org/10.1186/s12904-023-01267-5)

- Moreno S, Medina-Rico M, Osorio Clavijo K, Rodríguez NA, Vicuña Jiménez VM, Calvache JA, De Vries E (2023). End of Life in Patients With Advanced Non-curable Cancer: Patient Considerations Around the Moment of Death. _OMEGA - Journal of Death and Dying_ 2023;**0**. doi:[10.1177/00302228231190240](https://doi.org/10.1177/00302228231190240)

- Arango-Gutiérrez A, Moreno S, Rondón M, et al (2023). Factors associated with suffering from dying in patients with cancer: a cross-sectional analytical study among bereaved caregivers. _BMC Palliat Care_ 2023;**22**:48. doi:[10.1186/s12904-023-01148-x](https://doi.org/10.1186/s12904-023-01148-x)

# 2022

- Arroyo Castillo L, Arango-Gutiérrez A, De Vries E (2022). End of life of the cancer patient: patient, family and physician perceptions. _Colomb. J. Anesthesiol._ 2022;**50**:e1024. doi:[10.5554/22562087.e1024](https://doi.org/10.5554/22562087.e1024)

- Medina-Rico M, Osorio Clavijo K, Rodríguez NA, Vicuña Jiménez VM, Leal F, Calvache JA, Moreno S, De Vries E (2022). Fin de vida en pacientes con cáncer no curable. Percepciones de los pacientes sobre el sistema de salud. _Rev Gerenc Polit Salud_ 2022;**21**. doi:[10.11144/Javeriana.rgps21.fvpc](https://doi.org/10.11144/Javeriana.rgps21.fvpc)

- Arroyo LI, Ortega-Lenis D, Ardila L, Leal F, Morales O, Calvache JA, De Vries E (2022). Percepciones médicas sobre la atención en el final de la vida en pacientes oncológicos. _Rev Gerenc Polit Salud_ 2022;**21**. doi:[10.11144/Javeriana.rgps21.pmaf](https://doi.org/10.11144/Javeriana.rgps21.pmaf)

# 2021

- Diaz-Amado E, Calvache JA, de Vries E (2021). Pacientes y profesionales de la salud colombianos frente al final de la vida. _Rev. Fac. Cienc. Salud Univ. Cauca_ 2021;**23**:12-6. [URL](https://revistas.unicauca.edu.co/index.php/rfcs/article/view/2068)

- de Vries E, Leal Arenas FA, van der Heide A, et al (2021). Medical decisions concerning the end of life for cancer patients in three Colombian hospitals – a survey study. _BMC Palliat Care_ 2021;**20**:161. doi:[10.1186/s12904-021-00853-9](https://doi.org/10.1186/s12904-021-00853-9)

- Reid J, de Vries E, Ahmedzai SH, Arias-Rojas M, Calvache JA, Gómez-Sarmiento SC, Gomez ML, Parra-Cubides SL, Prue G, Moreno S (2021). Palliative care and oncology in Colombia: the potential of integrated care delivery. _Healthcare_ 2021;**9**:789. doi:[10.3390/healthcare9070789](https://doi.org/10.3390/healthcare9070789)

- Calvache JA, Moreno S, Prue G, et al (2021). Knowledge of end-of-life wishes by physicians and family caregivers in cancer patients. _BMC Palliat Care_ 2021;**20**:140. doi:[10.1186/s12904-021-00823-1](https://doi.org/10.1186/s12904-021-00823-1)

- Luna-Meza A, Godoy-Casasbuenas N, Calvache JA, et al (2021). Decision making in the end-of-life care of patients who are terminally ill with cancer – a qualitative descriptive study with a phenomenological approach from the experience of healthcare workers. _BMC Palliat Care_ 2021;**20**:76. doi:[10.1186/s12904-021-00768-5](https://doi.org/10.1186/s12904-021-00768-5)

- De Vries E, Vergara-García OE, Karduss-Preciado S, Baquero Castro V, Prieto Rodríguez S, Sánchez Forero M, et al (2021). The financial impact of a terminal cancer on patient′s families in Colombia – A survey study. _Journal of Cancer Policy_ 2021;**28**:100272. doi:[10.1016/j.jcpo.2021.100272](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jcpo.2021.100272)

- De Vries E, Velásquez M, Espejo A, Navarrete F, Robledo S, Salazar M, Baquero P, Buesaquillo C, Arango L, Burbano L, Andrade L, Calvache JA (2021). Conocimientos acerca de la eutanasia en estudiantes universitarios en dos instituciones de educación superior en Colombia. _Univ. Med._ 2021;**62**. [URL](https://revistas.javeriana.edu.co/index.php/vnimedica/article/view/31537)

# 2020

- Calvache JA, Gil F, de Vries E (2020). How many people need palliative care for cancer and non-cancer diseases in a middle-income country? Analysis of mortality data. _Colombian J Anesthesiol._ 2020;**48**. doi:[10.1097/CJ9.0000000000000159](https://doi.org/10.1097/CJ9.0000000000000159)

# 2018

- De Vries E, Buitrago G, Quitian H, Wiesner C, Castillo JS (2018). Access to cancer care in Colombia, a middle-income country with universal health coverage. _J Cancer Policy_ 2018;**15**:104–12. doi:[10.1016/j.jcpo.2018.01.003](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jcpo.2018.01.003)

<!-- /references -->

# Posters y presentaciones

# 2022

- Poster 12th World Research Congress of the EAPC 2022 ID P03:31. Knowledge of end-of-life wishes by physicians and family caregivers in cancer patients. _Palliative Medicine_ 2022;**36**(S1). doi:[10.1177/02692163221093145](https://doi.org/10.1177/02692163221093145)

- Poster 12th World Research Congress of the EAPC 2022 ID P03:42. Perceptions of End-of-Life Care by Treating Physicians in Cancer Patients. _Palliative Medicine_ 2022;**36**(S1). doi:[10.1177/02692163221093145](https://doi.org/10.1177/02692163221093145)

- Poster 17th World Congress of the EAPC 2021 ID J-17. Medical End-of-Life Decision Making in Colombian Cancer Patients. _Palliative Medicine_ 2021;**35**(S1). doi:[10.1177/0269216321103590](https://doi.org/10.1177/0269216321103590)

- Poster 17th World Congress of the EAPC 2021 ID N-31. Decision Making in the End-of-Life Care of Cancer Patients: A Qualitative Descriptive Study. _Palliative Medicine_ 2021;**35**(S1). doi:[10.1177/0269216321103590](https://doi.org/10.1177/0269216321103590)

- Presentation: Factors Associated with the Level of Suffering of Deceased Cancer Patients Who Received Care at Three Institutions with Oncology Services in Colombia. _The University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center_. [URL](https://mediaplayer.mdanderson.org/video-full/4F9BB0B2-0BCB-4FCC-979C-E30B6609555B)




# Tesis

# 2021

- Medina Rico MA (2021). Deseos al final de vida en pacientes con cáncer no curable: un abordaje desde la perspectiva del paciente. _Pontificia Universidad Javeriana_ 2021. [URL][http://hdl.handle.net/10554/53557]

# 2020

- Valdivieso Y (2020). Factores asociados al lugar de muerte de personas con cáncer a partir de análisis de datos administrativos, 2014-2017, Colombia. _Estudio de investigación_ 2020. [URL][http://hdl.handle.net/10554/49892]

- Luna Meza A (2020). Toma de decisiones prácticas médicas en el cuidado del final de la Vida del paciente terminal con cáncer: un abordaje desde la experiencia del personal de salud. _Pontificia Universidad Javeriana_ 2020. [URL][http://hdl.handle.net/10554/50644]



<!-- references -->
